word: G4359 - προσοφείλω - prosopheílō - pros-of-i'-lo - Over besides

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προσοφείλω

- Transliteration: Prosopheilo

- Phonetic: pros-of-i'-lo

- Definition:

1. to owe beside

- Origin: from G4314 and G3784

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4314 and G3784; to be indebted additionally: - over besides.
